rationale: Both papers concern customization, but the cited work is a Bayesian click-through/content-layout optimization model for email marketing, whereas the citing paper focuses on behavioral effects of a two-stage configurator architecture (CvSS) in experiments/field tests. With only a DOI-level reference match and no in-text citation context, the evidence is too sparse to tell whether this is merely background or a substantive foundation, so it cannot be safely dropped.
